name: Inbox Summary
summary: Produces a daily or weekly summary of email or task inbox for triage and prioritization.
description: Consumes a safe, local or API-provided representation of inbox items (e.g. email subjects and metadata, task titles) and produces a structured summary: priority buckets, suggested order, and key themes. Does not send email or modify inbox; output only.

inputs.description: Inbox source path or API endpoint (read-only)

outputs.description: Structured summary with priority and themes

env.name: INBOX_SOURCE
env.description: Path to JSON/MBOX file or read-only API URL

safety.description: Only reads from configured source; no sending or modifying of email.
Do not log or store credentials; use secure local or OAuth-backed APIs only.

steps: Configure INBOX_SOURCE (local file or read-only API)

execution.notes: Runtime must provide inbox data; this template defines prompt and schema only.
